description: Pinned fixtures for the docent hermetic harness. Each entry is a film spec committed under films/. The harness runs the engine cascade end-to-end and asserts the output is a valid video of the expected shape. What is pinned: the spec, the engine, the doctor manifest. What is NOT yet pinned: the survey stage (the agent authors the spec) — that arrives with the docent-agent APM package; until then the harness validates the deterministic half, the cascade.
